info.title: Orpheus API
info.description: Multi-tenant SaaS for asynchronous audio processing.

tags.name: health
tags.description: Liveness, readiness, and metrics endpoints used by orchestrators and operators.

get.description: Returns 200 OK if the process is alive. Container orchestrators (Kubernetes, ECS) use this endpoint to decide whether to restart the container. It must not depend on external services.
Returns 200 OK if the service is ready to accept traffic. In Phase 0 this always returns ready; Phase 1+ will check Postgres, Redis, and S3.

503.description: Service is not ready. Phase 1+ will return this when a downstream dependency is unhealthy.

get.description: Prometheus exposition format. Includes Go runtime metrics and process metrics by default. Phase 1+ will register domain-specific counters and histograms.

200.description: Metrics in Prometheus text exposition format.

schema.example:
# HELP go_goroutines Number of goroutines that currently exist.
# TYPE go_goroutines gauge
go_goroutines 7

status.description: Static liveness token. Always "ok" when the process is running.
Aggregate readiness verdict. "ready" iff every check is "ok".

checks.description: Per-dependency readiness results, keyed by dependency name.
